nodes.label: Has Remove Indicator? expression=$AddProperties/RemoveUnsyncedObjects != empty and $AddProperties/RemoveUnsyncedObjects != ExcelImporter.RemoveIndicator....
nodes.detail: Has Remove Indicator? expression=$AddProperties/RemoveUnsyncedObjects != empty and $AddProperties/RemoveUnsyncedObjects != ExcelImporter.RemoveIndicator....

pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: ExcelImporter.ValidateTemplate
NODES=53; EDGES=63
1. START
2. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve UserLanguage over association User_Language from currentUser
3. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable WarningString=''
4. DECISION Has object type expression=$Template/ExcelImporter.Template_MxObjectType != empty
5. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  6. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
  7. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetAddProperties -> AddProperties
  8. DECISION Has Remove Indicator? expression=$AddProperties/RemoveUnsyncedObjects != empty and $AddProperties/RemoveUnsyncedObjects != ExcelImporter.RemoveIndicator....
  9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    10. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
    11. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Columns from ExcelImporter.Column
    12. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable AnyColumnUsed=false
    13. LOOP iterate Columns as ColumnIter
      14. LOOP BODY
        15. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_Col
        16. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_Col
        17. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.SetColumnStatus -> Variable
        18. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
        19. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        20. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change ColumnIter (refreshInClient=true)
        21. DECISION column status invalid? expression=$ColumnIter/Status
        22. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable AnyColumnUsed=true
    23. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve AllKeyColumns from ExcelImporter.Column
    24. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=Count, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    25. DECISION import action expression=$Template/ImportAction
    26. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=(empty)
      27. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
      28. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_ReqField
      29. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_ReqField
      30. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      31. DECISION Show messages expression=$ShowWarningPopup
      32. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        33. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=The template is not valid because of the following reason(s): {1}, type=Warning, blocking=true)
        34. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        35. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.SF_Template_CheckNrs -> IsValid_2
        36. END
      37. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        38. REF ExclusiveMerge
    39. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=CreateObjects
      40. DECISION key columns > 0 expression=$Count > 0
      41. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        42. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoKeyAllowed
        43. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoKeyAllowed
        44. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        45. DECISION Any column used? expression=$AnyColumnUsed
        46. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          47. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
          48. DECISION has warning message? expression=trim( $WarningString ) != ''
          49. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
            50. REF ExclusiveMerge
          51. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
            52. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.SF_Template_CheckNrs -> IsValid
            53. END
        54. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          55. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve AllReferences from ExcelImporter.ReferenceHandling
          56. LOOP iterate AllReferences as Reference
            57. LOOP BODY
              58. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
              59. DECISION > 0 expression=$Count_1 > 0
              60. DECISION > 0 expression=$Count_1 > 0
              61. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoRefKey
              62. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
              63. ACTION AggregateListAction: AggregateListAction (output=Count_1, errorHandlingType=Rollback)
              64. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve MxReference over association ReferenceHandling_MxObjectReference from Reference
              65. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve KeyColumnsForReference from ExcelImporter.Column
              66. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_HasRefKey
              67. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_HasRefKey
              68. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoRefKey
              69. DECISION Create everything? expression=$Reference/Handling = ExcelImporter.ReferenceHandlingEnum.CreateEverything
          70. REF ExclusiveMerge
      71. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        72. REF ExclusiveMerge
    73. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=SynchronizeOnlyExisting
      74. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      75. DECISION key columns > 0 expression=$Count > 0 or not( $AnyColumnUsed )
      76. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        77. REF ExclusiveMerge
      78. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        79. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoKeyFound
        80. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoKeyFound
        81. REF ExclusiveMerge
    82. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=OnlyCreateNewObjects
      83. DECISION key columns > 0 expression=$Count > 0 or not( $AnyColumnUsed )
      84. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        85. REF ExclusiveMerge
      86. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        87. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoKeyFound_1
        88. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoKeyFound_1
        89. REF ExclusiveMerge
    90. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=SynchronizeObjects
      91. REF ExclusiveMerge
  92. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    93. DECISION Commit Unchanged Objects? expression=$AddProperties/CommitUnchangedObjects_MainObject = true
    94. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      95. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      96. DECISION Remove indicator selected? expression=$AddProperties/ExcelImporter.AdditionalProperties_MxObjectMember_RemoveIndicator != empty
      97. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        98. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        99. REF ExclusiveMerge
      100. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        101. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_Indicator
        102. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_Indicator
        103. REF ExclusiveMerge
    104. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      105. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_CommitUnchObjs
      106. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_CommitUnchObjs
      107. REF ExclusiveMerge
108. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  109. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow ExcelImporter.GetCorrectString -> OutputWarning_NoTemplateObjectType
  110. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable WarningString=$WarningString + ' ' + $OutputWarning_NoTemplateObjectType
  111. REF ExclusiveMerge
